footer.tagline: The LaLiga fantasy powered by DAZN. Build your team, compete and prove you're the best manager.
footer.copyright: DAZN Group Ltd. All rights reserved.
cookie.title: Cookie usage
cookie.text: We use our own and third-party cookies to improve your experience, analyze traffic and personalize content. By accepting, you consent to the use of all cookies.
landing.subtitle: Build your perfect team, compete against millions of managers and prove you're the best LaLiga strategist.
landing.steps.title: Start in
landing.steps.subtitle: It's fast, easy and addictive. Join the best LaLiga fantasy in minutes.
landing.step1.title: Create your account
landing.step1.text: Instant registration with your DAZN account. No hassle, no waiting. Start playing right away.
landing.step2.title: Build your squad
landing.step2.text: Pick your favorite players with a strategic budget. Analyze statistics and recent form.
landing.step3.title: Compete and win
landing.step3.text: Face managers from around the world. Every matchday counts, every decision matters. Prove your knowledge.
landing.cta2.title: Ready to dominate
landing.cta2.subtitle: Join thousands of managers and find out if you have what it takes to reach the top.
login.title: Sign in
register.title: Create account
register.password.error: Invalid password: use 8 to 12 characters, at least one uppercase letter and one special character.
home.subtitle: This is your control center. Check the latest LaLiga news, join leagues to compete with other managers and manage your profile. Every matchday is a new chance to climb the ranking.
home.where: Where do you want to go?
home.news.title: News
home.news.text: Injuries, suspensions and transfers in real time. Stay informed before locking in your eleven for the next matchday.
home.leagues.title: Leagues
home.leagues.text: Join public LaLiga leagues or create a private one with friends. Compete all season and climb the ranking.
home.profile.title: My profile
home.profile.text: Customize your manager, adjust notifications and link your DAZN account to unlock all features.
leagues.title: League
leagues.subtitle: Manage your competitions from one place: check your active leagues, join new ones and quickly access each team's squad.
leagues.management.help: Create new leagues or access the squads of the ones you already play in.
leagues.noLeagues: You haven't joined any league yet.
leagues.noAvailable: There are no leagues available to join right now.
leagues.joinModal.title: Join league
leagues.createModal.title: Add new league
user.title: User
user.subtitle: Manage your profile and account preferences
user.marketAlerts.desc: Receive alerts when a player's price changes
user.weeklySummary.desc: A weekly email with your performance
user.dangerZone.desc: Deleting your account will permanently erase all your data, leagues and statistics. This action cannot be undone.
classification.title: Classification
classification.subtitle: Check the updated classification of your fantasy league. See your position and your rivals'.
lineup.title: My
lineup.help: Drag starters and substitutes to swap them. Only swaps between players of the same position are allowed.
lineup.substitutes.help: You can also select a starter and click on a substitute to swap them.
lineup.noSquad: No squad available for the selected team.
market.title: Market
market.subtitle: 20 free players available to sign.
players.title: Players
players.subtitle: Informational list of all players available in the database.
players.search.placeholder: Name, first name or last name
news.title: Football
news.subtitle: Stay informed with the latest news, transfers, injuries and suspensions. All the information you need before locking in your lineup.
news.noResults: No news found for the selected source.
widgets.title: League standings
widgets.subtitle: Official LaLiga information: standings and upcoming fixtures.
admin.title: Administrator settings
admin.subtitle: Control matchdays and review registered users.
page404.text: This page does not exist or has been moved.
